asset_name: Afamelanotide / Melanotan I Authorised Product, Identity and Regulatory Source Closure
status: SOURCE CLOSED WITHIN DEFINED SCOPE / LIVING EVIDENCE ACTIVE
evidence_type: Authorised product and molecular identity evidence
controlled_conclusion: SCENESSE is an exact 16 mg afamelanotide subcutaneous implant for adults with erythropoietic protoporphyria, administered by trained healthcare professionals. The European authorisation is under exceptional circumstances and remains subject to post-authorisation monitoring. MT1 powder is not the implant and is not an authorised tanning or cosmetic product.

sources.title: SCENESSE current United States prescribing information

transfer_prohibited: Transfer from authorised finished product to catalogue supplier powder
Transfer from trial material to unverified supplier material
Creation of dosing, injection or reconstitution guidance
Assumption of supplier purity, potency, sterility, stability or equivalence
next_review_trigger: Material label, indication, safety, regulatory, trial, manufacturer, quality or supplier-evidence change
